from pathlib import Path
import sys

sys.path.insert(0, str(Path.cwd()))
from governance.runners.managed_channel_consumer import validate_message
from governance.runners.contour_lifecycle_runner import advance


def run():
    message = json.loads(Path("governance/tests/fixtures/bem931_mock_e2e_message.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    ok, errors = validate_message(message)
    if not ok:
        return {"ok": False, "stage": "managed_channel", "errors": errors}
    state = {"state": "queued"}
    for next_state in ["analyst_proposal", "auditor_precheck", "worker_execution", "auditor_postcheck"]:
        result = advance(state, next_state)
        if not result.get("ok"):
            return {"ok": False, "stage": next_state, "errors": [result.get("error")]}
        state = result["state"]
    result = advance(state, "completed", proof="mock_e2e_proof_not_release_proof")
    if not result.get("ok"):
        return {"ok": False, "stage": "completed", "errors": [result.get("error")]}
    return {"ok": True, "mode": "mock_e2e", "release_pass": False}

if __name__ == "__main__":
    result = run()
    print(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
    raise SystemExit(0 if result.get("ok") else 1)
